description_long: This is a muscular adult male boxer with a bald head, standing in a T-pose with arms extended horizontally. He is shirtless, revealing detailed upper body musculature and visible tattoos on his chest and back. He wears athletic boxing shorts with a side stripe, boxing gloves, and athletic shoes. The gloves are padded and shiny, suggesting synthetic or leather material, while the shorts are loose-fitting and made of a lightweight fabric. His posture and attire indicate he is prepared for a boxing match or training session. The overall appearance is that of a fit, professional athlete ready for action in an urban sports or gym environment.
description: A muscular, bald adult male boxer in a T-pose, shirtless with tattoos, wearing boxing gloves, athletic shorts, and sports shoes.
description_view_0: Back view showing muscular back, a tattoo on the upper spine, and the rear of the boxing shorts and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side stripe of the shorts.
description_view_2: Front view displaying chest tattoos, facial features, boxing gloves, and the front of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side stripe of the shorts.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic boxing shorts and boxing gloves
